debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
h : Meromorphic f
⊢ CircleIntegrable (fun x => logCounting f (↑x) r) 0 1

failed_attempts:
by_cases hr : r = 0
  · -- For r = 0, logCounting f a 0 = 0
    subst hr
    show CircleIntegrable (fun x : ℂ => logCounting f (↑x) 0) 0 1
    convert circleIntegrable_const (0 : ℝ) (0 : ℂ) (1 : ℝ) using 1
    ext; exact logCounting_eval_zero
  · -- For r ≠ 0, decompose via Jensen formula
    show CircleIntegrable (fun x : ℂ => logCounting f (↑x) r) 0 1
    have hdecomp : ∀ a₀ : ℂ, logCounting f (↑a₀) r =
        circleAverage (fun z => log ‖f z - a₀‖) 0 r
        - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun z => f z - a₀) 0‖
        + logCounting f ⊤ r :=
      logCounting_eq_decomposition h hr
    -- Each piece is circle integrable
    have h1 : CircleIntegrable (fun a₀ => circleAverage (fun z => log ‖f z - a₀‖) 0 r) 0 1 :=
      (continuous_circleAverage_log_norm h hr).continuousOn.circleIntegrable'
    have h2 : CircleIntegrable
        (fun a₀ => log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun z => f z - a₀) 0‖) 0 1 :=
      circleIntegrable_log_trailingCoeff h
    have h3 : CircleIntegrable (fun _ : ℂ => logCounting f ⊤ r) 0 1 :=
      circleIntegrable_const _ 0 1
    -- Combine: logCounting = h1 - h2 + h3
    have heq : (fun x : ℂ => logCounting f (↑x) r) =
        (fun a₀ => circleAverage (fun z => log ‖f z - a₀‖) 0 r
        - log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun z => f z - a₀) 0‖
        + logCounting f ⊤ r) := by
      ext a₀; exact hdecomp a₀
    rw [heq]
    exact (h1.sub h2).add h3
